description_zh: Zara是全球最大的时装零售商之一，1975年由阿曼西奥·奥尔特加在西班牙拉科鲁尼亚创立，是Inditex集团的核心品牌。Zara以其革命性的「快时尚」（Fast Fashion）商业模式闻名——从设计到上架最快仅需两周时间，远超传统品牌的六个月周期。品牌以「中端价格、高端设计」为理念，密切关注T台潮流和街头风尚，迅速将最新趋势转化为亲民价格的服装。Zara在全球近100个国家和地区拥有超过7000家门店，年营收超过200亿欧元。品牌不仅提供女装、男装和童装，还拥有鞋履、配饰和美妆产品线。Zara坚持少量多款的供应链策略，每周两次上新，创造「稀缺感」刺激消费。近年来品牌也在推动可持续发展，承诺到2025年实现全面使用可持续纤维。Zara的成功彻底改变了全球服装零售业的格局。

languages.en: Zara is the world's largest fast-fashion retailer, founded in 1975 by Amancio Ortega in A Coruña, Spain, as the core brand of the Inditex group. Renowned for its revolutionary fast-fashion business model — from design to store shelves in as little as two weeks, drastically faster than the traditional six-month cycle. With a 'mid-price, high-design' philosophy, Zara closely monitors runway trends and street styles, quickly translating them into affordable clothing. Operating in nearly 100 countries with over 7,000 stores, Zara generates annual revenue exceeding €20 billion. The brand offers women's, men's, and children's apparel, plus footwear, accessories, and beauty products. Zara's small-batch, high-frequency supply chain strategy creates a sense of scarcity by restocking twice weekly. In recent years, Zara has committed to sustainability, aiming for 100% sustainable fibers by 2025. Zara's success has fundamentally reshaped the global apparel retail landscape.
